notes: Spouse Mrs. Grace Otieno passed on 25 Jan 2024. Death certificate presented. Claim approved same day. Paid via M-Pesa to UMOJA002 on Jan 31st.

Member hospitalised 5-9 Feb 2024 (4 nights) at Aga Khan Hospital. Documents verified. Amount: KES 5000 per Article 8.2. Note: this is related to the same hospitalisation for which the loan LN-2024-001 was also taken — loan was for additional costs beyond welfare cover.

supporting_docs: Hospital discharge summary (Nairobi Hospital, ward 4B, 28 Mar – 01 Apr 2024)
notes: Member submitted claim for hospitalisation 28 Mar – 1 Apr 2024 (4 nights). Documents under review. DISPUTE FLAG: UMOJA017 has an outstanding late-fee dispute (DIS-2024-003). Welfare Coordinator notes the two matters are independent and the welfare claim should be processed on its own merits. Treasurer Rotich agrees.
Member married on 27 Apr 2024. Marriage certificate presented. Welfare contribution of KES 3000 per Article 8.2. One-time benefit confirmed (member's first marriage in Chama records).

Claim submitted for child's hospitalisation. However, the hospital documents show an outpatient visit (daycase), not an inpatient stay of 3+ days as required by Article 8.2. Welfare Coordinator rejected the claim. UMOJA011 has filed an appeal for the June meeting, arguing the child was held in observation for 36 hours (Article 8.4 appeal process invoked).
